visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit warehouse store, Costco. A woman in a patterned bucket hat and a white lace top stands in an aisle, holding two sets of kitchen towels—one yellow and one blue. Behind her, high metal shelving units reach the ceiling, stocked with various bulk consumer goods. (2) The camera zooms in to a close-up of the blue-striped towel set. The woman points with her right index finger to a circular embroidery detail featuring two blue birds on a branch with flowers. The packaging label 'Embroidered Kitchen Towels' is clearly visible. (3) She flips the bundle slightly to show the side label, which illustrates the four different patterns included in the pack. She gestures to show that only the top towel in the set has the large embroidery, while others have simpler patterns. (4) The scene cuts to her holding a green-striped bundle. She traces the embroidery of purple lavender and yellow flowers with her finger. Her facial expression remains cheerful and engaging. (5) She then presents a yellow-striped bundle where the embroidery depicts two peaches with green leaves. The lighting is uniform and industrial. (6) Finally, she holds a brown-striped bundle featuring three red-capped mushrooms. She smiles at the camera, gesturing towards the product while shoppers with carts are visible in the background aisles.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 最漂亮的抹布 細緻刺繡多用布. [Subtitle]: 這是我看過. (2) [Subtitle]: 最漂亮的抹布 好市多新出的. (3) [Subtitle]: 刺繡多用布. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後355元有4條. (5) [Variety]: 88塊. [Subtitle]: 所以每一條是 88塊. (6) [Subtitle]: 它有四個款式哦. (7) [Subtitle]: 首先是藍色的小鳥. (8) [Subtitle]: 你看這裡還有小花. (9) [Subtitle]: 真的很漂亮. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後像這個藍色一組啊. (11) [Subtitle]: 旁邊其他的就是紋路而已. (12) [Subtitle]: 刺繡的只有第一條. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後. (14) [Subtitle]: 綠色的花朵. (15) [Subtitle]: 我覺得這個紫色薰衣草. (16) [Subtitle]: 繡得好漂亮哦. (17) [Subtitle]: 拿來做餐巾布也很棒. (18) [Subtitle]: 黃色的水果. (19) [Subtitle]: 這個又大又圓真可愛. (20) [Subtitle]: 褐色的香菇. (21) [Subtitle]: 也很可愛. (22) [Subtitle]: 然後摸起來觸感 我覺得蠻好的. (23) [Subtitle]: 所以拿來墊著也好看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator in the foreground, with at least 2 other shoppers blurred in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with a friendly expression, wearing a black and white cow-print bucket hat, a white lace/crochet sleeveless top, and blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior featuring high steel storage racks, bulk pallets of kitchenware and home goods, concrete floors, and shoppers with carts in distant aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins narrating over a bright, mid-tempo acoustic guitar BGM with a steady drum beat. The vocal is clear and expressive, indicating excitement about a product discovery. The background has a clean studio-like quality despite the warehouse setting. (2) A subtle 'ding' or sparkle SFX triggers as the speaker mentions the price of the item, highlighting the '88 dollars' figure. The BGM maintains its upbeat energy without interruption. (3) The narration continues with descriptive phrases about the blue bird embroidery. The speaker's pitch rises when expressing admiration. (4) A soft 'whoosh' SFX occurs during a visual transition to the green flower pattern. The vocal remains consistent in its high arousal and positive valence. (5) As the speaker concludes the showcase, her tone remains energetic. The BGM concludes smoothly as she finishes her recommendation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Value Analysis -> Variation Showcase -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to recommend a specific set of embroidered kitchen towels found at Costco, emphasizing their aesthetic appeal and low per-unit price to attract budget-conscious home decor enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is structured as a personal discovery 'Vlog' style recommendation without explicit sponsorship labels, although the brand Costco is prominently featured.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A well-produced social media product review with clear audio-visual synchrony and effective use of on-screen text to highlight key value points.
